media.metaDescription: How many times does Midi Libre mention each candidate in the 2026 Montpellier municipal elections? Tracking @MLMontpellier tweets.
media.invisibilizationNote: Mentions by party only (without name or list) may indicate invisibilization of the candidate.
media.methodologyNote: Methodology: collection of public tweets from @MLMontpellier via scraping (no API key). Tweets are classified into three levels: mention of the candidate's name, the list, or the party/coalition. A single tweet may match multiple candidates.
media.noData: No data available. Run pnpm data:media to collect tweets.
